name: Osamu Dazai
description:
☆ ɢᴏᴏᴅ-ᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ | Dazai adopts the demon prodigy, and stops the cycle, for now.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

ANYPOV || TWS: mentions of violence, blood || Found-Family relationship (unofficial adoption) || fluff and angst

to the person who sent this request so long ago, I am SO sorry I couldn’t get to it sooner, honestly. I’ve been struggling quite a bit recently but I am getting help so there’s no need to worry 😋 I won’t talk about this too much this is a fluff bot after all..

also, requester, I won’t show your email but: THIS MADE MY DAY 😭😭🙏 THANKYOU SWEETHEART 💐💐💐🌸🌸🌸

Sooo yeah that’s it!! Happy chatting to probably the last bot of this mini-series unless someone requests a good next part to it (requests made this series not me so thanks you guys 😭 doing my job for me fr)

Finished making at: 11:55PM
